MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Settings.Debug.Name: Log fixed Active Effect keys
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Settings.Debug.Hint: Print every corrected Active Effect key to the console.
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Settings.Verbose.Name: Verbose logging
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Settings.Verbose.Hint: Print all Active Effect keys inspected by this module, including keys that were not changed.
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Settings.FixCPRLookup.Hi: Let Cauldron of Plentiful Resources find automations for bilingual names such as 'Сглаз / Hex'.
MIDI_LOCALE_FIX.Settings.SuppressCPRWarn: Hide known false CPR warnings, currently the Fire Shield tour lookup warning.
